criteria.description: --group-by <field> groups and counts entries by field value
--count outputs only the count of matching entries

criteriaResults.notes: GroupBy function handles well-known fields (level, message/msg) and Extra map fields. 4 unit tests + 2 integration tests. Sorted output with (empty) label for missing fields.
SelectFields filters to requested fields from canonical + Extra. FormatEntryJSON outputs JSON with selection. 3 unit tests + 1 integration test.
LimitEntries caps slice to N; 0 or negative means no limit. 3 unit tests + 1 integration test.
CountEntries returns len(entries). --count flag checked before group-by/limit. 2 unit tests + 2 integration tests (standalone and combined with --level).

preflight.gofmt: pre-existing issue in internal/filter/filter.go (not this iteration)

verificationReports.notes: All tests are non-tautological with concrete data and specific expected values. CLI integration tests build binary and verify end-to-end behavior. No hidden debt found.
